\tzpentry{ID5930}{Holonomy Lagrangian}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5930 introduces Holonomy Lagrangian as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \mathrm{Lk}(C_1,C_2) = \frac{1}{4\pi} \oint_{C_1} \oint_{C_2} \frac{(\mathbf{r}_1-\mathbf{r}_2)\cdot(d\mathbf{r}_1 \times d\mathbf{r}_2)} {|\mathbf{r}_1-\mathbf{r}_2|^3} \end{equation}
